name: Your Pokémon wants give you their knot??
description:
WILD ass title 😭😭

took a while but I have returned

(User is presumed to be either Rose's friend or trainer for long enough for her to develop feelings for them. There are three starting messages, one is the scenario where she invited you to the riverbank to confess to you, one where she invited you to hang out with her at her apartment, then finally a blank message if you really just hate my starting messages and want to make your own 😢.)

Anyway ngl I may or may not have returned to bot-creation PURELY for the badge lol, but atleast I made an actual bot.
creator: douchfugga
